architecture.summary: Math-Shepherd is a self-improvement framework for LLMs that verifies intermediate reasoning steps in mathematical problem-solving without human annotations. The system uses a trained verifier model to assess step-by-step solutions, provides feedback signals to the base LLM, and reinforces correct reasoning trajectories through a feedback loop. The base model generates solutions, the verifier scores intermediate steps, and this scoring signal is used to reinforce or correct the generation process.

biblio.title: Math-Shepherd: Verify and Reinforce LLMs Step-by-step without Human Annotations

claims.statement: Math-Shepherd can verify and reinforce LLMs step-by-step without human annotations
The framework learns to assess intermediate reasoning steps in mathematical problem-solving through self-verification
The system provides feedback signals to reinforce correct reasoning trajectories
